name: Buddy
description: Persistent AI coding companion with 21 species and personality stats.

commands.name: /buddy-status
commands.description: Check your Buddy's current status and personality

commands.name: /buddy-mode
commands.description: Set buddy's voice mode and/or guard mode.

commands.name: /buddy-doctor
commands.description: Run diagnostics on your Buddy installation.

commands.name: /buddy-reasoning-status
commands.description: Inspect what guard mode has stored.

commands.name: /buddy-remember
commands.description: Manually add a memory for your Buddy to observe.

commands.name: /buddy-respawn
commands.description: Release your current Buddy companion and clear all data.

commands.name: /buddy-share
commands.description: Share a report of your recent progress and Buddy's status.
